title: Operate and maintain gravity fed irrigation systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate and maintain gravity fed irrigation systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for gravity fed irrigation system operation and maintenance

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select and use required materials, tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use required materials, tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use required materials, tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for gravity fed irrigation system operation and maintenance

elements.title: Operate pumps and delivery mechanisms

pcs.text: Prime pumps and open or close valves and controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prime pumps and open or close valves and controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prime pumps and open or close valves and controls.

pcs.text: Position and set up pipes, system equipment and outlets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position and set up pipes, system equipment and outlets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position and set up pipes, system equipment and outlets.

pcs.text: Set and operate delivery mechanisms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set and operate delivery mechanisms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set and operate delivery mechanisms.

pcs.text: Implement start-up sequence and slowly build up water levels and pressure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement start-up sequence and slowly build up water levels and pressure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement start-up sequence and slowly build up water levels and pressure.

pcs.text: Check pressure at the head-works and control valves
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pressure at the head-works and control valves?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pressure at the head-works and control valves.

pcs.text: Distribute water evenly to the targeted areas with minimal wastage and run-off
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Distribute water evenly to the targeted areas with minimal wastage and run-off?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Distribute water evenly to the targeted areas with minimal wastage and run-off.

pcs.text: Irrigate area and observe time lag between shutdown and end of watering to minimise run-off and deep percolation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Irrigate area and observe time lag between shutdown and end of watering to minimise run-off and deep percolation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Irrigate area and observe time lag between shutdown and end of watering to minimise run-off and deep percolation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate pumps and delivery mechanisms

elements.title: Monitor drainage and tail-water systems

pcs.text: Monitor water intake, conveyance and distribution, drainage and tail-water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor water intake, conveyance and distribution, drainage and tail-water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor water intake, conveyance and distribution, drainage and tail-water.

pcs.text: Check water reuse systems for clearance and freedom from weeds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check water reuse systems for clearance and freedom from weeds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check water reuse systems for clearance and freedom from weeds.

pcs.text: Monitor pumps, if used, during operation, clear rubbish from outlets and backflush pump
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pumps, if used, during operation, clear rubbish from outlets and backflush pump?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pumps, if used, during operation, clear rubbish from outlets and backflush pump.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record damage and blockages with contaminants by damage type, location and the section of the system affected.
